digest.en: Mali Defence Minister was killed. Fresh fighting broke out between the army and rebels. Russian Defence Minister is in North Korea for talks with top leadership.
digest.hi:
अमेरिकी पूर्व राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप के पेंसिलवेनिया में चुनावी रैली में फायरिंग हुई। हमलावर ने ट्रंप को गोली मारने की कोशिश की, लेकिन वह बच गए। अटॉर्नी जनरल ने खुलासा किया कि हमलावर का निशाना ट्रंप ही थे।

इस बीच, नेपाल में नई सरकार ने चीन के साथ हुए समझौतों की जांच शुरू कर दी है। नई सरकार ने इन समझौतों पर रोक लगा दी है। 

लखनऊ सुपर जायंट्स आज इंडियन प्रीमियर लीग में कोलकाता नाइट राइडर्स से भिड़ेगी। यह मैच लखनऊ के इकाना स्टेडियम में होगा।

articles.title: Mali Defence Minister killed, fresh fighting between army and rebels
articles.summary: Defence Minister Sadio Camara died in a car bomb attack on his home in Kita. His second wife and two grandchildren also died. Defence Minister Sadio Camara, his second wife and two of his grandchildren died after a car bomb attack on his home in the junta stronghold of Kita, outside Bamako, his family and an official said.

articles.title: Alex Marquez wins Spanish Grand Prix while brother Marc crashes out
articles.summary: Alex Marquez won the Spanish Grand Prix. His brother Marc crashed out. Alex Marquez wins Spanish Grand Prix while brother Marc crashes out.

articles.title: Trump's 'Lincoln' Reply To 'Why Does This Keep Happening To You?' Question
articles.summary: Trump faced a safety threat on Saturday. It is not his first safety threat. Saturday's incident is far from the first time Trump has faced a threat to his safety.

articles.title: Russian Defence Minister In North Korea, To Hold Talks With Top Leadership
articles.summary: Russian Defence Minister visited North Korea. He will hold talks with top leadership. This is the second senior Russian official to visit Pyongyang in recent days. Russian Defence Minister In North Korea, To Hold Talks With Top Leadership.

articles.title: Trump assassination attempts and security incidents
articles.summary: A timeline lists Trump assassination attempts and security incidents during his presidency and campaign. Timeline reveals assassination attempts on Trump, including incidents during his presidency and campaign rallies.

articles.title: Inside Washington Hilton attack, how President Trump was escorted out
articles.summary: A man is in custody after trying to rush the White House Correspondents' Dinner. Donald Trump was attending the event at the Washington Hilton. Inside Washington Hilton attack, how President Trump was escorted out.

articles.title: "Saw Trump's Resilient Side": Indian Journalist Who Attended US Event To NDTV
articles.summary: Saurabh Shukla spoke to NDTV about attending a US event with Donald Trump. He discussed Trump's resilient side. Newsmobile editor-in-chief Saurabh Shukla in conversation with NDTV's Shiv Aroor. "Saw Trump's Resilient Side": Indian Journalist Who Attended US Event To NDTV.

articles.title: Erica Kirk In Tears After White House Dinner Shooting
articles.summary: Erica Kirk was in tears after a shooting at the Washington Hilton. The event was taking place at the time of the incident. The shooting happened at the time when the event was taking place at the Washington Hilton.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'Hormuz will not return to previous state', Iran
articles.summary: Donald Trump said a shooting incident will not deter him from winning in Iran. He made the statement amid ceasefire talks. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Shooting incident won't deter me from win in Iran war, says Trump The Times of India.

articles.title: Karoline Leavitt's Unwitting Prophecy Came True As 'Shots Fired' At Trump Event
articles.summary: Karoline Leavitt previously mentioned shots being fired. A shooting occurred at a Trump event at the Washington Hilton. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt (file). Karoline Leavitt's Unwitting Prophecy Came True As 'Shots Fired' At Trump Event.

articles.title: What we know about the suspected ‘assassination attempt’ on Donald Trump
articles.summary: A man armed with a gun tried to rush the White House Correspondents' Dinner. Donald Trump was in attendance at the Washington Hilton. A man armed is in custody after trying to rush the White House Correspondents' Dinner, which Trump was attending.

articles.title: Kenya's Sawe becomes first man to run marathon under two hours at London Marathon
articles.summary: The London Marathon saw a historic moment as Kenyan runner Eliud Kipchoge's training partner, Kelvin Kiptum, finished in 1 hour 59 minutes 31 seconds, becoming the first man to break the two-hour barrier in a marathon.

articles.title: Trump says Kushner, Witkoff no longer going to Pakistan for Iran talks
articles.summary: Jared Kushner and Elliott Broidy's associate, Steven Witkoff, are no longer traveling to Pakistan for Iran talks, according to US President Donald Trump. Live Updates: Trump says Kushner, Witkoff no longer going to Pakistan for Iran talks CBS News.

articles.title: UK Influencer Dies 6 Days After Getting Hit By Car Outside London Nightclub
articles.summary: Polish social media influencer Klaudia Zakrzewska, known as Klaudiaglam, died six days after being hit by a car outside a London nightclub, leaving behind a following of over 250,000 on Instagram.

articles.title: UK In Touch With US Ahead Of King Charles' Visit Amid Trump Security Breach
articles.summary: The UK government is in contact with the US ahead of King Charles' visit, amid concerns over security following a breach at the White House, where the monarch and his wife, Camilla, are due to arrive on Monday.

articles.title: Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi expected back in Pakistan despite U.S. cancellation
articles.summary: Oman's Sultan met Iran's Araghchi to discuss the regional situation. The meeting occurred amid US-Iran tensions. U. S. President Trump cancels Pakistan talks trip and says Iran war on hold; U.

articles.title: 40 Years After the Meltdown, War Layers Another Disaster on Chernobyl
articles.summary: The Chernobyl disaster zone remains under army control 40 years after the meltdown, with plans to develop the contaminated area for economic benefits in Ukraine stalled for the foreseeable future.

articles.title: Ethiopia's Assefa breaks own world record at London Marathon
articles.summary: Ethiopia's Assefa broke his own world record at the London Marathon. Ethiopia's Assefa breaks own world record at London Marathon.

articles.title: Explosive device kills 13, injures 38 on bus in southwestern Colombia as violence persists
articles.summary: A device killed 13 and injured 38 on a bus in Colombia's Cauca region. Octavio Guzman, the Governor of the region of Cauca, said on X that the device was set off while the bus was travelling along the Panamerican Highway in the municipality of Cajibio.

articles.title: At least four people killed in Israeli attacks in Gaza despite ‘ceasefire’
articles.summary: Israeli forces killed at least four people in Gaza despite a ceasefire. Israeli forces keep advancing further into western Gaza, slowly expanding the area of their control in the east.

articles.title: Jaissle hails historic win after Al-Ahli retain Asian Champions League title
articles.summary: Al-Ahli retained the Asian Champions League title under coach Jaissle. Jaissle hails historic win after Al-Ahli retain Asian Champions League title.

articles.title: ट्रंप की डिनर पार्टी के दौरान हुई फ़ायरिंग के बाद भारत, पाकिस्तान समेत दुनिया के नेताओं ने क्या कहा?

articles.title: ट्रंप के कार्यक्रम में गोलीबारी का घटनाक्रम: कैसे सुरक्षा घेरा तोड़ घुसा संदिग्ध, फायरिंग के बाद
articles.summary: व्हाइट हाउस कॉरेस्पोंडेंट्स डिनर के दौरान फायरिंग की घटना हुई थी. इसमें एक संदिग्ध शामिल था जिसने सुरक्षा घेरा तोड़कर कार्यक्रम में घुसपैठ की थी. अमेरिका के वॉशिंगटन में व्हाइट हाउस कॉरेस्पोंडेंट्स डिनर के दौरान हुई फायरिंग की घटना ने सुरक्षा व्यवस्था पर गंभीर सवाल खड़े कर दिए हैं।

articles.title: ट्रंप जिस होटल में कर रहे थे इवेंट, वहीं ठहरा था संदिग्ध; सुरक्षा देख खोया आपा
articles.summary: ट्रंप ने होटल में एक इवेंट का आयोजन किया था। हमलावर भी उसी होटल में ठहरा था। सुरक्षा बलों ने हमलावर को पकड़ने की कोशिश की, लेकिन उन्हें खो दिया।

articles.title: ईरान ने खाड़ी देशों में अमेरिकी टेक कंपनियों को निशाना बनाकर जंग की परिभाषा कैसे बदली?
articles.summary: ईरान ने अमेरिकी सहयोगी देशों पर हमले किए, जिनमें अमेरिकी टेक कंपनियों से जुड़े ठिकाने शामिल थे। ईरान ने हमले के बाद नुक़सान की चेतावनी भी दी। अमेरिका और इसराइल के साथ जंग में ईरान ने खाड़ी में अमेरिका के सहयोगी देशों के ऐसे ठिकानों पर हमले किए और नुक़सान की चेतावनी दी जिनका संबंध बड़ी टेक कंपनियों से है.

hi.title: ईरान ने खाड़ी देशों में अमेरिकी टेक कंपनियों को निशाना बनाकर जंग की परिभाषा कैसे बदली?

articles.title: हिल जाएगी दुनिया... गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह
